description: Difficulty-graded N-1 scenarios on reconstructed RTE7000 France THT (>=200 kV) operating points. Non-antenna only. Difficulty is the expert recommender's solvability at the 95% monitoring factor, judged by a REAL simulation of each action/combination (islanding-rejecting; pre-existing N-state overloads not caused by the contingency are ignored): EASY = a suggested unitary action truly resolves; MEDIUM = no unitary resolves but a first-identified combination does; HARD = neither. Unplayable cases (no action brings the worst line below 120%) are excluded.
